title: Stress Therapy | #shorts
full_text: Zoya I don't understand why you're always constantly so stressed out just tell me what's your problem I take care of you to the nth degree and yet there is problems tell me a problem I'm going to fix it right now so I just have the kind of mom that stalks my location and I'm supposed to go on a date this week and I really want to turn off my location but I'm worried she's going to why you have to turn off your location to go on a date I just want some sense of privacy why you need privacy what you going to do on this date it's just my right as a person who's becoming an oh I shouldn't have to be hovered upon okay you know how we could fix all this is if your mom went on the date with you I know your mother very well she's very very reasonable she will just sit in a corner and Google whoever you're with and do all the due diligence quietly like a mouse like sh in fact he she will even figure out his net worth his blood type and whether or not he's an organ donor what's the right answer you don't need to know that she'll make the decisions for you see how I reduced your stress in one session
